---
title: "Posit + Snowflake: orbital in place, in Snowflake (Python, vertical)"
format:
  revealjs:
    width: 900
    height: 1200
    include-after-body:
      - js/orbital-inplace.html
---

```{=html}
<script>
  window.ORB_POSIT         = true;
  window.ORB_ORIENT        = 'vertical';
  window.ORB_MODEL_LABEL   = 'Pipeline';
  window.ORB_SESSION_LABEL = 'Posit Workbench';
  window.ORB_SESSION_LOGO  = 'Py';
  window.ORB_SNOWFLAKE     = '#29B5E8';
  window.ORB_RSESSION      = '#3776AB';
</script>
```

## {.orb-slide}

::: {.orb-stage-wrap}
<div id="orb-stage"></div>
:::

[]{.fragment .orb-frag id="orb-compile"}
[]{.fragment .orb-frag id="orb-embed"}
[]{.fragment .orb-frag id="orb-run"}
[]{.fragment .orb-frag id="orb-newdata"}
[]{.fragment .orb-frag id="orb-newpred"}
